generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring environmental temperature integrated into BIM model with metadata including tenant IDs and endpoint addresses for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring relative humidity levels integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor detecting occupancy status integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring ambient light levels integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring energy consumption metrics integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance BASTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System sensor measuring temperature integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance BASHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System sensor measuring humidity integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature sensor readings transmitted via Eclipse Hono protocol to Ditto framework for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor, BASTemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity sensor readings transmitted via Eclipse Hono protocol to Ditto framework for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor, BASHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status transmitted via Eclipse Hono protocol to Ditto framework for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time light level measurements transmitted via Eclipse Hono protocol to Ditto framework for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption metrics transmitted via Eclipse Hono protocol to Ditto framework for digital twin management."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model enriched with runtime semantics including sensor metadata, control logic, and device representations managed via Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance DeviceRepresentationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital representations of devices (sensors, actuators) managed via Eclipse Ditto for real-time state tracking and bidirectional synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Normalized operational data including sensor readings, device states, and energy metrics processed for analytics and visualization."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, HumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto, UnrealEngine5
]

instance SensorMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata extracted from BIM model including tenant IDs, device IDs, and endpoint addresses for sensor integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight M2M service protocol for secure real-time data ingestion from IoT sensors and BAS devices using Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIngestionService, SensorDataNormalizationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin framework managing device representations and real-time state synchronization using Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeviceStateManagementService, BidirectionalSynchronizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D game engine providing rich interactive visualization of building infrastructure and operational metrics."
    DTDFVocab:enables ImmersiveVisualizationService, RealTimeDashboardService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering methodologies automating transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (model-to-model and model-to-text)."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedDeploymentService, RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning framework (e.g., BOREALIS) for predictive analytics and optimization of building systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationRecommendationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeDataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling secure ingestion of real-time data streams from IoT sensors and BAS devices via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataIngestionInsight
]

instance SensorDataNormalizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service normalizing and mapping sensor data to BIM-based digital twin model for consistent representation."
    DTDFVocab:provides NormalizedSensorDataInsight
]

instance DeviceStateManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing real-time device states and representations using Eclipse Ditto framework."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeviceStateTrackingInsight
]

instance BidirectionalSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service maintaining bidirectional data flow between physical assets and digital twin using Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:provides SynchronizationStatusInsight
]

instance ImmersiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3D visualization of building infrastructure and operational metrics using Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides Interactive3DVisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real-time dashboards for operational metrics visualization (energy use, occupant comfort)."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsDashboardInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service identifying trends (equipment failures, energy waste) using reinforcement learning (BOREALIS)."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight, EnergyWasteDetectionInsight
]

instance OptimizationRecommendationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service suggesting adjustments (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints) to improve building efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:provides EfficiencyOptimizationAction
]

instance AutomatedDeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime artifacts (middleware configurations) via model-driven engineering transformations."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentArtifactInsight
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service creating deployable artifacts from BIM models including middleware configurations and control scripts."
    DTDFVocab:provides GeneratedArtifactInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeDataIngestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of successful real-time data ingestion from all connected IoT sensors and BAS devices."
]

instance NormalizedSensorDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of sensor data normalization and mapping to BIM-based digital twin model."
]

instance DeviceStateTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current state of all devices (sensors, actuators) managed by Eclipse Ditto framework."
]

instance SynchronizationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of bidirectional synchronization between physical assets and digital twin."
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure with real-time operational metrics overlay."
]

instance OperationalMetricsDashboardInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard showing energy use, occupant comfort, and other operational metrics for facility managers."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted equipment failures identified through reinforcement learning analysis of sensor data."
]

instance EnergyWasteDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected energy waste patterns and inefficiencies in building operations."
]

instance EfficiencyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated recommendations for lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints, and other operational adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated runtime artifacts ready for deployment including middleware configurations."
]

instance GeneratedArtifactInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of generated control scripts and deployment packages from BIM model transformations."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator controlling adaptive lighting systems with bidirectional communication via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System controller managing HVAC systems with real-time adjustments enabled by digital twin."
]

instance ShadingDeviceActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System actuator controlling shading devices with automated control logic from digital twin."
]

instance PLCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Programmable Logic Controller managing building automation systems with digital twin integration."
]

// C1: Twinning Process Components
instance DeviceModelingTool : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Tool used by Building Control Engineers to define sensors, actuators, and controllers within BIM environment."
]

instance ModelValidationEngine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Engine ensuring semantic consistency and compliance with BIM standards during twinning process."
]

instance MDETransformationEngine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering transformation engine generating runtime artifacts from BIM models."
]

instance RuntimeConfigurationManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component supporting runtime configuration updates and service extensions without full redeployment."
]

// C10: Additional Models
instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal performance model of building infrastructure integrated with operational data for energy optimization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

instance OccupantComfortModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Occupant comfort model analyzing environmental conditions and providing optimization recommendations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningFramework
]

// C11: Additional Enablers
instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points allowing integration of custom services and third-party tools (e.g., energy management plugins)."
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceIntegrationService
]

// C6: Additional Services
instance CustomServiceIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling integration of domain-specific plugins (energy management, occupant comfort optimization)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationInsight
]

// C17: Additional Insights
instance CustomServiceIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status of integrated custom services and third-party tool connections."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BIMModel,
    DeviceRepresentationModel,
    OperationalData,
    SensorMetadata,
    EclipseHono,
    EclipseDitto,
    UnrealEngine5,
    ModelDrivenEngineering,
    ReinforcementLearningFramework,
    StandardizedExtensionPoints,
    LightingActuator,
    HVACController,
    ShadingDeviceActuator,
    PLCController,
    DeviceModelingTool,
    ModelValidationEngine,
    MDETransformationEngine,
    RuntimeConfigurationManager,
    ThermalModel,
    OccupantComfortModel
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control signals and commands** generated by the DT’s services (e.g., optimization algorithms, reinforcement learning models) and transmitted back to the BCS via middleware. The framework automates the generation of **runtime interfaces** for actuators and controllers, enabling the DT to adjust physical systems in real-time (e.g., dimming lights, activating HVAC systems). This is achieved through **model-to-model and model-to-text transformations** that map virtual control logic to physical execution endpoints."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual worlds. The framework supports **sub-second latency** for critical control loops (e.g., lighting adjustments) and **near-real-time updates** for broader operational data (e.g., energy consumption trends). The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of synchronization, ensuring high temporal alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture (SOA)**, where the DT framework acts as a central hub connecting:
  - **BIM-based design models** (static representations).
  - **Real-time operational data** (dynamic representations).
  - **Middleware services** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange).
  - **Visualization and analytics services** (Unreal Engine 5, custom plugins).
  The constellation supports **modular integration**, allowing stakeholders (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers) to interact with specific DT components (e.g., monitoring dashboards, control interfaces) while maintaining a unified system view."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the entire life cycle of building infrastructures, including:
  1. **Design phase**: Leveraging BIM for static modeling and initial device configuration.
  2. **Construction phase**: Integrating as-built data and sensor deployments.
  3. **Operational phase**: Real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control.
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: Dynamic updates to the DT to reflect physical modifications.
  The DT’s representation evolves from **as-designed (ideal)** to **as-manufactured** and finally to **as-operated**, ensuring alignment with the physical asset’s state throughout its life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is evaluated using the **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**, which quantifies the alignment between the DT and its physical counterpart. Validity considerations include:
  - **Verification**: Ensuring the DT’s models and data accurately reflect the physical system (e.g., via sensor calibration and model validation).
  - **Validation**: Testing the DT’s services in real-world scenarios (e.g., Living Lab case studies).
  - **Uncertainty management**: Addressing data gaps or inconsistencies through **semantic normalization** and **real-time error correction**.
  The framework also incorporates **quality assurance** mechanisms to detect and resolve **semantic drift** (divergence between digital and physical states) over time."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) relies on:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: Provides **MQTT/AMQP** protocols for secure, lightweight data exchange between IoT devices and the DT.
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: Manages **digital twin instances** and their **digital twins** (DTs) via **HTTP/REST APIs** for state synchronization.
  - **Bidirectional communication**: Enabled through **model-to-model transformations** that map BIM elements to runtime endpoints (e.g., sensor IDs to middleware topics).
  The architecture supports **scalable network topologies**, including **edge computing** for low-latency control loops."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **modular, service-oriented deployment architecture**, with components distributed across:
  - **Cloud/edge servers**: For middleware (Hono/Ditto) and analytics services.
  - **Local BIM environments**: For design-time modeling and initial configuration.
  - **Unreal Engine 5**: For visualization, deployed on high-performance workstations or cloud-based rendering platforms.
  The framework supports **containerized deployment** (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) for scalability and **hybrid cloud-edge setups** to optimize latency for real-time services."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves exchanging information with **external systems**, including:
  - **Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems**: For financial and asset management data.
  - **Building Energy Management Systems (BEMS)**: For cross-platform energy optimization.
  - **Other Digital Twins**: Via standardized APIs (e.g., Ditto’s **Thing Description** format) for interoperability.
  The framework supports **semantic interoperability** through **BIM-based ontologies** and **middleware normalization**, ensuring seamless data exchange across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is governed by **stakeholder-specific roles** (e.g., Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers) and **BIM-based access controls**. Privacy considerations include:
  - **Role-based access**: Restricting data visibility to authorized users (e.g., DT Engineers for service development).
  - **GDPR compliance**: Anonymizing occupant data (e.g., sensor readings) where required.
  - **Secure data pipelines**: Encrypting data in transit (e.g., TLS for Hono/Ditto) and at rest.
  The framework does not explicitly address **PT owner vs. DT service provider** ownership conflicts but assumes alignment with **AECO industry standards** (e.g., ISO 19650)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **BIM standards**: IFC (Industry Foundation Classes) for model exchange and **IDM (Information Delivery Manual)** for data structuring.
  - **IoT standards**: Eclipse Hono’s **OMA LWM2M** and **MQTT** for device communication.
  - **Digital Twin standards**: Eclipse Ditto’s **Thing Description** format for interoperability.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE) standards**: For automated transformations (e.g., **MOF/QVT** for model-to-model mappings).
  The framework also defines **custom extension points** to accommodate domain-specific standards (e.g., lighting control protocols in TwinLight)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security measures include:
  - **Authentication/Authorization**: Role-based access control (RBAC) for middleware and visualization tools.
  - **Data encryption**: TLS for Hono/Ditto communication and **secure storage** for sensitive data.
  - **Anomaly detection**: Monitoring for unauthorized access or data tampering.
  Safety considerations address:
  - **Remote operation limits**: Restricting DT-controlled actions to **pre-approved scenarios** (e.g., lighting adjustments) to prevent physical hazards.
  - **Fail-safes**: Defaulting to manual control or predefined states in case of system failures.
  The framework does not explicitly detail **human safety protocols** for critical operations (e.g., HVAC shutdowns) but assumes compliance with **AECO safety regulations** (e.g., ISO 55000 for asset management)."
]
